storyboard.content: I keep getting heartburn and acid coming back up into my throat
This has been happening on and off for a few months
I get a burning feeling in my chest when the acid comes up
Sometimes I get a sour or bitter taste in my mouth
It's worse after big meals or spicy food, and much worse when I lie down at night. Antacids help but the symptoms always come back
The discomfort is mild to moderate and hasn't stopped me from doing things day to day
I'm a 40-year-old man and I'm overweight
